title: At the doctor's
explanation:
At the doctor's

Listen to a patient talking to a doctor.

Transcript

Doctor: What's the problem?
Patient: I have a headache and a sore throat.
Doctor: Do you have a fever?
Patient: Yes, a little.
Doctor: You should rest and drink lots of water. Take this medicine twice a day.
Patient: OK. Thank you, doctor.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The patient has a headache and a [*sore throat|broken leg|stomach ache].
The doctor says to [*rest|run|work] a lot.
The medicine is taken [*twice a day|once a week|never].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The doctor asks: 'What's the ____?' | *problem | time | name
The patient should drink lots of ____. | *water | coffee | food
The patient has a sore ____. | *throat | hand | foot
The patient says thank you, ____. | *doctor | nurse | teacher

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The doctor asks about fever [*after|before|never] hearing the symptoms.
